calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Apr-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Abram P. Petersen; Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP; 415-981-0550; appearing as counsel for defendants Veritas Investments, Inc. and Greentree Property Management, Inc.
Timothy Kelly; 707-570-7507; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Chrislyn Earle.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling.After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED as requested: Demurrer based on uncertainty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to either attach the referenced exhibits or remove the references to the exhibits; demurrer to the cause of action for habitability tort is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
